description: FEMA disaster declaration number (DR-XXXX) identifying the storm
County name (representative; some zips span multiple counties)
Households whose property was physically inspected by a FEMA inspector (owners + renters summed)
Inspected households in Major or Substantial damage category (owners >$20k + renters major+substantial)
Inspected households in Minor damage category (owners $1-10k; renter schema has no minor bucket)
Inspected households in Moderate damage category
Persons with income below the poverty level
Persons identifying as White alone (used to derive pct_minority = 1 - white/total)
Persons in poverty as % of population
Mobile homes as % of housing units
Tract-share share of LILA (Low-Income Low-Access) tracts at 1-mile/10-mile thresholds (post-aggregation)
Share of households without vehicle and >1mi from supermarket
1 if LILATracts_1And10 >= 0.5 in zip's underlying tracts
Authorized SNAP retailers spatially within zip polygon
Geodesic distance from zip centroid to nearest "Super..." retailer
Geodesic distance from zip centroid to nearest point on hurricane track
Share of zip area within SFHA flood zones (mostly missing in this build; superseded by NRI)
Coastal-flood risk score (CFLD_RISKS) aggregated to zip via HUD crosswalk
Hurricane risk score (HRCN_RISKS) aggregated to zip via HUD crosswalk
Maximum sustained wind speed at peak intensity
Categorical bin of verified_damage_per_1000 using SEVERITY_BINS [-inf
1 if any food_access feature was NaN before imputation
